education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering, Computer Science and Engineering
education.relevant_coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Database Management Systems, Software Engineering, Object Oriented Programming

certifications.name: Oracle Cloud Infrastructure 2023 Certified Foundations Associate
Journey to Cloud: Envisioning Your Solution
MongoDB Node.js Developer Path for SmartBridge

projects.name: ERPilot AI — Multi-Tenant ERP SaaS Platform
projects.tech_stack: Python, Flask, SQLite, Docker, Gemini API

bullet_variants.text: Architected a multi-tenant SaaS ERP system from scratch, designing a 7-table relational schema with tenant_id-based isolation to securely support unlimited tenants.
Built role-based access control (RBAC) and authentication workflows from first principles across 7 functional modules covering employees, inventory, suppliers, sales, and reporting.
Designed and implemented REST-based backend modules in Flask for employee management, inventory tracking, supplier management, and sales processing.
Integrated the Gemini API to power an AI assistant inside the ERP for context-aware business queries, with logging for every AI interaction.
Containerized the full application with Docker and configured a production-ready deployment path using Gunicorn.

projects.name: Graphical Password Authentication with Data Hiding — Final Year Project
projects.tech_stack: Python, Flask, OpenCV, AES Encryption, DWT Steganography, SQLite

bullet_variants.text: Engineered a 3-factor authentication framework combining username/password validation, graphical image verification, and PIN-based authentication to strengthen user security.
Implemented AES encryption for secure file protection and integrated DWT-based steganography for hidden data embedding and secure information sharing.
Designed secure file upload, access-approval, and file-sharing workflows to improve confidentiality and access control mechanisms.
Built a full-stack web application integrating authentication modules, encrypted storage, image processing, and database-driven user management.
Applied secure storage concepts inspired by distributed cloud architecture to enhance resilience against unauthorized access and data breaches.

projects.name: Real Estate Management System — Team Project
projects.tech_stack: HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, MySQL, XAMPP

bullet_variants.text: Built a full property management platform supporting listings, search/filtering, bookings, and inquiry workflows, backed by a normalized MySQL schema.
Developed admin modules for managing properties, feedback, and transaction records, with responsive interfaces across devices.
Built Android features using Java and Kotlin, integrating Firebase backend services into application workflows.
Took part in design, testing, and debugging cycles, gaining direct exposure to mobile SDLC practices.
Built responsive web interfaces in HTML/CSS validated across desktop and mobile breakpoints.
Designed UI layouts in Figma, then implemented them as functioning frontend components.
Contributed to wireframing, prototyping, and frontend implementation using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript within a collaborative team workflow.
Designed and built responsive website layouts, focusing on cross-device usability and accessibility.

summary_variants.text: Computer Science Engineering graduate specializing in full-stack web development with Python and Flask. Built and shipped a multi-tenant SaaS ERP platform from architecture through deployment, including REST API design, role-based access control, and AI integration. Comfortable across the stack: backend logic, database schema design, REST APIs, and frontend implementation.

Software Engineering graduate with hands-on experience building multi-factor authentication systems and secure file protection pipelines. Skilled in frontend validation, REST API debugging, and mobile app design/testing cycles during professional internships.

Full Stack developer specializing in Python/Flask and JavaScript web applications. Experienced designing normalized databases, integrating generative AI, and building responsive Figma-to-code interfaces. Seeking roles to build features end-to-end.

Computer Science Engineering graduate with experience building a multi-tenant SaaS ERP system with modular tracking for inventory, sales, suppliers, and employees. Deep understanding of business isolation logic, reporting flows, and workflow coordination.
